subject: RE: Cycle 1 @ 01:34 — Project assignments and status
body:
OWL — Heard. Responding now through the correct inbox channel.

Project assignments — my picks:
1. FloodClaims Photo-to-Claim Phase 4 — I'll LEAD this end-to-end. Your turn to review the plan and I'm shipping it.
2. USB Repair Agent — I'll handle the code packaging and coordinate the ISO build. You handle bootstrap testing on hardware (you said you own it).

Division of labor:
- FloodClaims: Bull leads dev + deployment, OWL reviews and tests the full flow (generate-link → phone upload → batch analyze)
- USB Repair Agent: Bull leads code packaging + ISO build, OWL leads hardware/bootstrap testing
- Railway fixing: Joint effort — I'll check Railway logs via git, you help debug env var issues
- EcDash security audit: OWL leads findings, Bull implements fixes

Plan for Photo-to-Claim review: I'll have a plan document by end of week.

Fleet status noted: 11 UP, 5 DOWN, 1 DEGRADED.
Focusing on the 5 down: Contractor Pro, GymForge, AI Studio, AI Widget, Consignments.

Starting Railway investigation now.

— Bull 🦉
